content.text: Let me start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me analyze all 6 fixes:

All 6 fixes target the **same 3 lines** (207, 210, 213) and the **same CSS class** `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group`. The fixes come from different rules but all say the same thing: the `pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` class (and its parent classes `pf-v5-c-select` and `pf-v5-c-select__menu`) have been removed in PF v6 with no equivalent replacement.

In PatternFly v6, the Select component was rewritten. The old `pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` maps to the new composable Select which uses the Menu component internally. The appropriate PF v6 replacement for `__menu-group` is `pf-v6-c-menu__group` (from the Menu component used by the new Select).

Let me verify this class exists:

The `pf-v6-c-menu__group` class exists in PF v6 and is already used in the sibling file `catalog-flow.ts` with the exact same pattern. This confirms the correct replacement.

Now let me apply the fix:
All three lines have been updated correctly. Let me also verify no remaining `pf-v5` references exist in the file:

No remaining `pf-v5` references in the file. The fix is clean and complete.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group` with `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` on lines 207, 210, 213. The PF v6 Select component uses the Menu component internally; `pf-v6-c-menu__group` is the correct replacement (confirmed by identical usage in sibling file `catalog-flow.ts`). |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 — the `__menu` portion of the old class is subsumed by the new `pf-v6-c-menu__group` class. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-select-menu-group` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 — the full `__menu-group` element is replaced by `pf-v6-c-menu__group`. |
| Fix 4 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 (duplicate rule from a different rule source). |
| Fix 5 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 (duplicate rule from a different rule source). |
| Fix 6 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-select-menu-group` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 (duplicate rule from a different rule source). |

All 6 fixes targeted the same 3 lines with the same CSS class selector `.pf-v5-c-select__menu-group`. The replacement `.pf-v6-c-menu__group` was chosen because PF v6's Select component is built on the Menu component, and the sibling Cypress test file (`catalog-flow.ts`) already uses this exact class with the same `.eq(N).find('ul>li').first().click()` pattern. No imports or other code needed cleanup.
